S.FORM: bsilung bsilung ga pslyan kwara qsya ru musa te umi la.
S.PHON: βs~ɕiluŋ βs~ɕiluŋ ɣa ps~ɕljan kwara qs~ɕja ru mus~ɕa te umi la.
